name: Siemens Building X / Desigo CC API
what_it_does: Siemens Building X and Desigo CC REST APIs for building management and smart building IoT platform. Enables AI agents to manage HVAC setpoint and control system automation for energy optimization, handle real-time sensor and equipment status retrieval for building operations, access energy consumption and demand data for sustainability and cost management, retrieve alarm and fault management data for predictive maintenance, manage occupancy and space utilization data for workplace optimization, handle fire safety and access control system integration, access chiller plant and AHU performance data for equipment optimization, retrieve BACnet/Modbus device data via cloud gateway abstraction, manage building digital twin data for facilities management, and integrate building system data with energy management, CMMS, and workplace platforms.
use_cases: Optimizing HVAC setpoints from energy management agents
Monitoring building equipment faults from predictive maintenance agents
Analyzing space occupancy from workplace optimization agents
Retrieving energy consumption data from sustainability reporting agents
not_for: Industrial process control without commercial building HVAC and BMS focus
Simple smart home without enterprise building management system complexity
Residential building without commercial facilities and energy management context
best_when: A facilities manager or building operator using Siemens building management systems wants AI agents to automate energy optimization, predictive maintenance, space utilization analysis, and building system monitoring.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: Building automation system (BAS) control commands affect physical safety systems — fire suppression, elevator control, and access control automation without safety interlocks is dangerous. HVAC automation without freeze protection and occupant comfort validation can damage equipment or harm occupants. Life safety systems require certified BAS technician oversight for any automated changes.

auth.notes: Siemens Building X uses OAuth 2.0 with Siemens identity platform. Per-building tenant credentials. Developer portal at developer.siemens.com. Building X is cloud platform wrapping on-premise Desigo CC via gateway. Webhooks for alarm and event notifications. BACnet/Modbus device abstraction via cloud API. REST API with JSON. Munich, Germany HQ.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-building and per-point subscription; API access included in Building X cloud plan
pricing.notes: Munich, Germany. Siemens AG Smart Infrastructure division. Building Technologies and Desigo CC brand. Building X is cloud-native rebrand (2022). 300,000+ buildings managed globally. Strong in commercial, healthcare, and campus facilities. Competes with Johnson Controls Metasys and Honeywell Forge for BMS market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: BAS control commands for life safety systems (fire, access) must never be automated without safety interlock verification; control-plane automation requires certified BAS oversight
Cloud-to-on-premise gateway latency — Building X API calls traverse cloud-to-Desigo-CC gateway; control commands have latency; real-time control responsiveness limited vs. direct BACnet
BACnet point abstraction — building points are abstracted via Building X; understand the mapping from Building X data model to BACnet object identifiers for accurate control
On-premise Desigo CC requirements — Building X cloud API requires on-premise Desigo CC gateway installation and commissioning; cloud-only access not available for existing BMS
Alarm storm handling — building system alarm flood during failures can overwhelm webhook endpoints; implement alarm aggregation and deduplication before processing
HVAC freeze protection — automated HVAC setpoint reduction without freeze protection interlocks can damage heating systems and building infrastructure in cold climates
agent_readiness.security_notes: Building automation and smart building. ISO27001, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US. HVAC, access control, and occupancy data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Building management systems. ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US. Physical building control and sensor data.
